{{Quote|Interceptor Four, reporting.|An Interceptor IV [[Captain/Legends|captain]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Interceptor IV''-class frigate''' was a commonly used [[Starship/Legends|starship]] in the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium's]] [[Navy/Legends|naval]] forces. It was effective against [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and small [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]].

==Characteristics==
The Interceptor Four was an upgrade of the [[Interceptor-class frigate/Legends|''Interceptor''-class frigate]] widely used by [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] forces, which was itself a modified [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI transport]].

With superior [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]] and improved weaponry, as well as the "full salvo" [[Missile/Legends|missile]] capabilities that allowed the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] to fire a barrage of missiles at its target, the Interceptor was a cheap, yet versatile, vessel. It also possessed powerful [[Engine/Legends|engines]] allowing it to reach extremely high sublight velocities for a vessel of its size. The ship's weakness was its lightly armored [[Hull/Legends|hull]].

{{Ship-stub}}
